backend/main.mo: Main actor defining security types (Threat, SecurityAlert, SecurityPolicy, User, Incident, SecurityScan) and CRUD operations for managing threats, alerts, policies, users, incidents, and scans with in-memory Map storage and auto-incrementing IDs.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms OldSecurityPolicy records to NewSecurityPolicy records by adding a digitalSignature field initialized to null.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: Sign Policy button in PolicyCard, signature verification status display, and React Query hooks for signing/verifying policies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including App.tsx (routing), hooks (useQueries with sign/verify policy mutations), pages (Dashboard, Login, NetworkActivity, SecurityScan, SecurityPolicies, Analytics, IncidentResponse), and components (layout, alerts, dashboard, network, scan, policies, analytics, incidents).
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for background, foreground, card, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, charts, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the CyberShield application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with protected and public routes (login, dashboard, network, scan, policies, analytics, incidents), ThemeProvider, and Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/alerts/AlertMana: Alert management component that simulates random security alerts every 15 seconds, maintains the last 3 alerts, and renders AlertNotification components in a fixed top-right position.
frontend/src/components/alerts/AlertNoti: Individual alert notification card displaying severity-coded alerts with icon, message, timestamp, and dismiss button with slide-in animation.
frontend/src/components/analytics/Attack: Bar chart component displaying attack pattern distribution by threat type (Malware, Phishing, Unauthorized, DDoS) using Recharts with cyberpunk styling.
frontend/src/components/analytics/Threat: Displays a 7-day line chart showing threat trends by severity level (critical, high, medium, low) using Recharts, currently rendering mock data.
frontend/src/components/analytics/TimeRa: A dropdown select component for choosing time ranges (24h, 7d, 30d, all time) to filter analytics data.
frontend/src/components/analytics/Vulner: Renders a pie chart showing the distribution of threats by severity level, filtering from the threats prop or falling back to mock data.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProtectedRo: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to login and shows a loading spinner during Internet Identity initialization.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Metric: Displays a grid of four metric cards showing active threats, critical alerts, active policies, and system status with icons and color-coded styling.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Recent: Shows a scrollable list of recent security threats sorted by timestamp, displaying severity badges, threat types, and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/System: Displays operational status of four system components (Firewall, IDS/IPS, Database, API Gateway) with icons and status badges over a network background.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Threat: Shows the highest current threat level based on active threats with color-coded styling, glow effects, and a count of detected threats.
frontend/src/components/incidents/Incide: A form component for creating new security incidents with title, description, and severity fields, using the useAddIncident mutation hook.
Displays a table of active security incidents with mock data showing title, severity, status, and date columns.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main application layout component with sidebar navigation, header with user identity display and logout button, footer with branding, and alert manager integration.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: Sidebar navigation component displaying menu items (Dashboard, Network, Security Scan, Policies, Analytics, Incidents) with active state highlighting and icons.
frontend/src/components/network/Connecti: Filter controls for network connections with protocol dropdown (All, HTTPS, HTTP, DNS, SSH, TCP) and checkbox to show only suspicious connections.
Table displaying network connections with mock data, showing source/destination IPs, ports, protocols, transfer rates, and status with suspicious connection highlighting.
frontend/src/components/network/DataTran: Line chart component displaying 24-hour upload and download data transfer rates using Recharts library with mock time-series data.
frontend/src/components/policies/PolicyC: Card component for individual security policy with enable/disable toggle, digital signature status display, verification, and signing functionality using backend mutations.
frontend/src/components/policies/PolicyL: Grid layout component that renders a list of security policies using PolicyCard components in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/scan/ScanControl: Security scan control component with start/stop buttons, simulated progress tracking, mock vulnerability results generation, and backend scan persistence.
frontend/src/components/scan/ScanHistory: Table displaying historical security scan records with mock data showing date, vulnerability count, severity level, and completion status.
frontend/src/components/scan/ScanProgres: Progress indicator component showing scan percentage, current phase description, and progress bar during active security scans.
frontend/src/components/scan/ScanResults: React component that displays security scan results in a card, showing vulnerability count, severity badge, and a list of findings with alert icons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend operations including fetching threats/policies, adding threats/incidents/scans, updating policies, registering users, and signing/verifying policy signatures.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom cybersecurity-themed design tokens (neon colors, dark theme), utility classes for glowing buttons and cards, and Inter font import.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Analytics.tsx: Analytics dashboard page displaying security metrics, threat trends, attack patterns, and vulnerability statistics with time range filtering.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main security dashboard page showing real-time threat monitoring with metrics grid, threat level indicator, recent events, and system status components.
frontend/src/pages/IncidentResponse.tsx: Incident response management page with a toggleable form for creating new incident reports and a list view of existing incidents.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page component with Internet Identity authentication, featuring a cyberpunk-themed UI with animated background, glowing effects, and feature highlights (threat monitoring, secure auth, incident response).
frontend/src/pages/NetworkActivity.tsx: Network activity monitoring page displaying active connections, data transfer rates, and suspicious activity with filtering capabilities and a data transfer chart visualization.
frontend/src/pages/SecurityPolicies.tsx: Security policies management page showing total, active, and inactive policies with a PolicyList component for viewing and configuring security rules.
frontend/src/pages/SecurityScan.tsx: Security scan page with controls to initiate scans, progress tracking, results display, and scan history, featuring a visual scanning animation overlay.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom cyberpunk theme colors (neon green/cyan/magenta), OKLCH color system, custom animations (accordion, pulse-glow), and neon shadow effects.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document listing implemented features including dashboard, alerts, network activity, security scans, authentication, policy management, analytics, incident response, and cyberpunk UI theme.
